## AssemblyScanner Class

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.AssemblyScanner.ScanForDomainTypes(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable_System.Reflection.Assembly_)'></a>

## AssemblyScanner\.ScanForDomainTypes\(IEnumerable\<Assembly\>\) Method

Scans multiple assemblies for all concrete aggregate and projection types\.
Returns a combined result with de\-duplicated types and cross\-assembly duplicate domain name detection\.

```csharp
public static Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.DiscoveryResult ScanForDomainTypes(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<System.Reflection.Assembly> assemblies);
```

The assemblies to scan\.

[DiscoveryResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.DiscoveryResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Discovery\.DiscoveryResult')  
A combined [DiscoveryResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.DiscoveryResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Discovery\.DiscoveryResult') with de\-duplicated types\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.AssemblyScanner.ScanForDomainTypes(System.Reflection.Assembly)'></a>

## AssemblyScanner\.ScanForDomainTypes\(Assembly\) Method

Scans an assembly for all concrete aggregate and projection types in a single pass\.
Results are cached per assembly for subsequent calls\.

```csharp
public static Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.DiscoveryResult ScanForDomainTypes(System.Reflection.Assembly assembly);
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.AssemblyScanner.ScanForDomainTypes(System.Reflection.Assembly).assembly'></a>

The assembly to scan\.

#### Returns
[DiscoveryResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.DiscoveryResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Discovery\.DiscoveryResult')  
A [DiscoveryResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Discovery.DiscoveryResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Discovery\.DiscoveryResult') containing both aggregate and projection types\.
